${ModID}:Downforce.NAME: Downforce
${ModID}:Downforce.DESCRIPTION: Apply !M! Vulnerable and !M! ${ModID}:Ignite to ALL enemies.

${ModID}:NitrousBash.NAME: Nitrous Bash
${ModID}:NitrousBash.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Apply ${ModID}:Nitro to !M! random cards in your hand.

${ModID}:SparkPlugs.NAME: Spark Plugs
${ModID}:SparkPlugs.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage 3 times. NL If this enters your hand during your turn, it costs 0.

${ModID}:TurnAndBurn.NAME: Turn and Burn
${ModID}:TurnAndBurn.DESCRIPTION: Apply !M! ${ModID}:Ignite. NL If this enters your hand during your turn, apply ${ModID}:Nitro to 1 random card in your hand.
${ModID}:TurnAndBurn.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Apply !M! ${ModID}:Ignite. NL If this enters your hand during your turn, apply ${ModID}:Nitro to 2 random cards in your hand.

${ModID}:Afterburner.NAME: Afterburner
${ModID}:Afterburner.DESCRIPTION: When a card enters your hand during your turn, apply ${ModID}:Nitro to a random card in your draw pile.
${ModID}:Afterburner.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Innate. NL When a card enters your hand during your turn, apply ${ModID}:Nitro to a random card in your draw pile.

${ModID}:Overtuned.NAME: Overtuned
${ModID}:Overtuned.DESCRIPTION: Apply ${ModID}:Nitro to !M! random cards in your hand. NL Shuffle this card into your draw pile.

${ModID}:TwinTurbo.NAME: Twin Turbo
${ModID}:TwinTurbo.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL If this enters your hand during your turn, NL gain [E] .

${ModID}:V16.NAME: V16
${ModID}:V16.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage 4 times. NL For the rest of combat, draw 1 additional card at the start of your turns.

${ModID}:Dragster.NAME: Dragster
${ModID}:Dragster.DESCRIPTION: The first card you play each turn gains ${ModID}:Nitro and is shuffled into your draw pile.
${ModID}:Dragster.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: The first !M! cards you play each turn gain ${ModID}:Nitro and are shuffled into your draw pile.

${ModID}:HighOctane.NAME: High Octane
${ModID}:HighOctane.DESCRIPTION: Gain !M! Vigor for every card in your hand. NL Apply ${ModID}:Nitro to all the Attacks in your hand. NL Exhaust.
